description: ehsconst/subcontractor-management cited 건설산업기본법 Article 45, verified via legalize_kr (MST 273435) to mean '경영합리화 등의 노력' (business-management-rationalization duty), unrelated to subcontractor safety. ehsconst/daily-safety-inspection and ehsconst/tbm-tool-box-meeting both cited Article 83, verified to mean '건설업의 등록말소 등' (business-registration cancellation), unrelated to daily inspection or TBM content. Confirmed wrong-article citations, not merely unverified statutes.
